title: dodonaea submutica
intro: Dodonaea submutica, also known as the 'Makomako' or 'Small-leaved Hop-bush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea submutica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and ease digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and infusions in oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
